text:
Created attachment 219130
sysutils/fluent-bit 1.6.2 build log on FreeBSD 11.4 amd64

Hello!

We've encountered problems building fluent-bit 1.6.2 on FreeBSD 11.4 amd64
Port fails to build with default options:
     PGSQL=off: PostgreSQL database support
     SSL=on: SSL protocol support

Additional build information can be found in the attached build log.
